text: Hello everyone, welcome to the course on OpenSpec and Antigravity.
Today we're going to dive deep into Spec-Driven Development.
Before we begin, let me just adjust my microphone... okay, that's better.
OpenSpec solves the underspecification problem by requiring a formal markdown design before coding.
Antigravity acts as the project engineering assistant, helping us manage these files.
Let's take a look at the slide on the screen, which outlines the 7 production methods.
The third method combines animation with original clips, providing the best of both worlds.
This concludes our lecture. Don't forget to practice creating your own Storyboard YAML.
